---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the laravel-satim package
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. Ex. "The package does not expose the
SATIM *status* operation, so I cannot [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen (e.g. a new gateway method, request DTO,
response accessor, config option or enum case).

**Proposed API (optional)**
If you have an idea of how the feature should look, sketch the usage:

```php
```

**SATIM reference (optional)**
Link to or quote the relevant part of the official SATIM / CIB documentation, and the endpoint or
error codes involved, if applicable.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the feature request here.
